full_text:
Liu Yi (Zhongxiong)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yi, styledZhongxiong, was born in Ye county in Donglai. Honest in his criticism, once compared Sima Yan unfavourably to last Han emperors. Liu Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Liu Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
